# Tiny Tasks Generated Files

This folder contains the Stage 3 fabricated text files for the minimal complete Todo web app example.

## Scope

```text
- React-style TypeScript component files.
- CSS styling.
- Package manifest draft.
- Illustrative test file.
```

## Important validation note

The example package records these files as fabricated text artifacts. Build, dependency installation, and test execution are not claimed unless run in an external Node/Vite environment.
